sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20550" key="bouko/lhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βουκόλ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n20550.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beguilement</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῆς λύπης</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:136:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">136.9</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
